description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house set within a fenced yard, featuring a mix of brick and stucco exterior walls with green climbing plants adding a natural touch. The house has a flat and low-pitched roof, with multiple large windows arranged asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front entryway is marked by a double door, flanked by tall windows and accessed via a short set of steps, with a landscaped garden and mature trees enhancing curb appeal. A spacious driveway leads to a two-car garage with a gabled roof, positioned to the side of the main structure. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool and a patio area, ideal for outdoor activities and relaxation. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and features a mix of grass lawns, shrubs, and trees for privacy and aesthetic value.
description: A modern, spacious suburban house with brick and stucco walls, large asymmetrical windows, a two-car garage, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, tall windows, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Garage and driveway are prominent, with the house receding into the background and trees lining the property.
description_view_2: Backyard view highlights the swimming pool, patio, and rear facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Rear and side view showing the boundary wall, side windows, and green lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Double door entry with steps, tall flanking windows, and landscaped approach
